violations.text: Observed establishment lacking allergy statement. -PIC wrote allergy statement and posted it in the establishment during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The dumpster is not emptied at a frequency adequate enough to prevent overflow of debris and refuse. Dumpster shall be scheduled for at least one additional pickup to prevent overflow. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
